name: azadirachta indica
title: azadirachta indica benefits
description: Azadirachta indica treats respiratory issues by alleviating symptoms such as coughing, wheezing, and shortness of breath, providing relief to individuals suffering from conditions like asthma, bronchitis, and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD). This benefit is crucial, as respiratory issues can significantly impact daily life, limiting physical activity and affecting overall well-being.
